name: Vendor
phrases: Welcome, traveler! What brings you to my humble shop?
I've got the best prices in three kingdoms, friend!
Fresh wares just arrived! Come have a look!
Stay a while and browse, no pressure here.
Got a coin or two? I've got something special for you.
Looking for supplies? You've come to the right place!
Press V and let's make a deal!
Trust me, I've been doing this for twenty years.
Need something sturdy? I've got just the thing.
These herbs are freshly picked, the best you'll find!
A discount, you say? Perhaps we can negotiate, friend.
Are you brave or foolish? Either way, I've got gear for you!
I've seen much worse than what you're carrying, no judgment.
Steady there, friend. Take a moment, look around.
Haven't heard a goblin all week—safe as can be!
Oh, hello again! Come back for more, have you?
I'm the caretaker of these finest trinkets in the realm.
Something smells like... troll? That yours or mine?
You look like you need supplies. Am I right?
I'd help you if I could, but let's make it a fair trade.
Fancy a deal today? I'm feeling generous!
Tea? No? That's fine, more for me then.
Mind the rats in the corner—they're friendly enough.
Lucky you found me out here! Most folk never do.
I keep odd hours, but I'm always here when you need me.
The goblins around here? They won't bite me. Respect, you know.
They tolerate me. Maybe because I give them fair prices too!
Got an old sword you want to trade? I buy almost anything.
Everything must go at these prices—I'm practically giving it away!
Come back soon, friend. I'll hold the best items for you!
